title: BOMB Telemetry Board
subtitle: Fall 2025 — Ongoing
subheader: The BOMB (Battlebots Onboard Monitoring Board) is a device that hopefully tries to bring a new era of data to combat robotics.

content.caption: Back of the board. We are running an ESP32S3 for logic, and an SD card for on-board storage.

content.value: This project is still underway, but the board is currently being assembled. More to come soon...
